name: Resource Request

labels: resource-request
assignees: ''
-------------

# Resource Submission

Thank you for helping improve the learning resources available through this roadmap.

Please complete the sections below.

---

## Resource Name

Provide the exact name.

Examples:

* Build a Large Language Model From Scratch
* DeepLearning.AI Agentic AI Course
* LlamaIndex Documentation

---

## Resource Type

Select one:

* [ ] Book
* [ ] Research Paper
* [ ] GitHub Repository
* [ ] Online Course
* [ ] YouTube Channel
* [ ] Video Series
* [ ] Documentation
* [ ] Community
* [ ] Blog
* [ ] Newsletter
* [ ] Other

---

## Resource URL

Provide the primary URL.

Example:

```text
https://github.com/example/repository
```

---

## Author / Organization

Who created this resource?

Examples:

* Sebastian Raschka
* Hugging Face
* DeepLearning.AI
* OpenAI
* Anthropic

---

## Relevant Roadmap Section

Where should this resource be listed?

* [ ] Foundations
* [ ] Machine Learning
* [ ] Deep Learning
* [ ] LLM Engineering
* [ ] RAG
* [ ] Agent Engineering
* [ ] LLMOps
* [ ] Multimodal AI
* [ ] AI Safety
* [ ] Projects
* [ ] General Resources

---

## Difficulty Level

* [ ] Beginner
* [ ] Intermediate
* [ ] Advanced
* [ ] Expert

---

## Resource Summary

Provide a brief overview.

Example:

A hands-on guide that walks readers through building a GPT-style language model from scratch.

---

## Why Is This Resource Valuable?

Explain why it deserves inclusion.

Examples:

* Covers an important missing topic.
* Industry-standard reference.
* Beginner-friendly.
* Strong practical focus.
* Frequently recommended by practitioners.

---

## Topics Covered

Select all that apply.

### Core AI

* [ ] Python
* [ ] Mathematics
* [ ] Statistics
* [ ] Machine Learning
* [ ] Deep Learning

### LLM Engineering

* [ ] Prompt Engineering
* [ ] Fine-Tuning
* [ ] Alignment
* [ ] Evaluation

### RAG

* [ ] Embeddings
* [ ] Retrieval
* [ ] Vector Databases
* [ ] GraphRAG

### Agents

* [ ] Tool Calling
* [ ] Multi-Agent Systems
* [ ] Workflows
* [ ] Orchestration

### Deployment

* [ ] Docker
* [ ] Kubernetes
* [ ] Monitoring
* [ ] Serving

### Advanced Topics

* [ ] Multimodal AI
* [ ] Edge AI
* [ ] AI Safety
* [ ] Security

---

## Cost

* [ ] Free
* [ ] Paid
* [ ] Freemium

Approximate cost:

---

## Last Updated

If known:

```text
Month Year
```

Example:

```text
May 2026
```

---

## Resource Quality Assessment

Rate the resource.

### Technical Depth

* [ ] Low
* [ ] Medium
* [ ] High

### Practical Focus

* [ ] Low
* [ ] Medium
* [ ] High

### Beginner Friendliness

* [ ] Low
* [ ] Medium
* [ ] High

---

## Alternative Resources

Are there competing resources that should also be considered?

Examples:

* FastAI
* Hugging Face Course
* Full Stack Deep Learning

---

## Supporting Evidence

Provide any supporting information.

Examples:

* GitHub stars
* Community recommendations
* Industry adoption
* Conference references
* Academic citations

---

## Additional Notes

Include any additional context.

---

## Checklist

* [ ] Resource URL is valid.
* [ ] Resource is relevant to AI Engineering.
* [ ] Resource is actively maintained or historically significant.
* [ ] Resource is not already listed.
* [ ] Resource category is correctly selected.

---

Thank you for helping improve the AI Engineer Roadmap.
